features.name: Project scaffold
features.description: Rust project structure with Cargo.toml, src layout, and dependencies

features.name: CLI argument parsing
features.description: clap-based CLI with --yesterday (-y) and --date (-d YYYY-MM-DD) flags

features.name: ESPN API integration
features.description: Fetch NBA scoreboard data from ESPN public API for a given date

features.name: Game summary display
features.description: Formatted colored terminal output showing teams, scores, game status, venue, and tip-off time
features.verification: cargo run -- -d 2024-01-15 shows formatted game summaries

features.name: Error handling
features.description: Graceful error messages for network failures, invalid dates, and API errors
features.verification: cargo run -- -d not-a-date prints readable error and exits non-zero

features.name: Integration tests
features.description: Tests for API fetching, date parsing, and edge cases
